post.summary: Invite users to a mural
post.description:
Allows an authenticated user of a mural to invite members and/or guests.

You can invite users by specifying either their email address or their username.
In both cases the user is notified by email. However, when inviting by username,
the user is immediately added to the mural.

**Authorization scope**: `murals:write`

scopes.rooms:read: Read information about rooms (for room members and owners).
scopes.rooms:write: Write information about rooms (for room owners).
scopes.users:read: Read information about users (guests, members, and visitors).
scopes.workspaces:write: Write information about workspaces (for workspace owners)
scopes.workspaces:read: Read information about workspaces (for workspace members and owners).
scopes.murals:read: Read information about murals (for mural members and owners).
scopes.murals:write: Write information about murals (for mural members and owners).
scopes.identity:read: Read information about currently authenticated user.
scopes.templates:write: Write information about templates (for templates owners)

MuralFolderId.description: The UUID of the folder this mural belongs to.

MuralInfinite.description: When true, this indicates that the mural canvas is borderless and grows as you add widgets to it.

ExpiresOn.description: The Unix timestamp in milliseconds, after which the visitor link becomes invalid. When null, the visitor link does not expire.

allOf.description: The background color of the mural.

height.description: The height of the mural in px.

width.description: The width of the mural in px.

timerSoundTheme.description: The timer sound theme for the mural.

visitorAvatarTheme.description: The visitor avatar theme for the mural.

allOf.description: The background color of the mural.

height.description: Height of the mural in px.

allOf.description: The ID of the room containing the mural.
The unique ID of the workspace containing the mural.

width.description: Width of the mural in px.

timerSoundTheme.description: The timer sound theme for the mural.

visitorAvatarTheme.description: The visitor avatar theme for the mural.

SharingPermissions.description: The permissions for a collaborator on a mural.

link.description: Link that a visitor can use to access a mural.

confidential.description: When true, the mural is confidential. Confidential murals do not allow a share link and cannot be duplicated or moved to other workspaces.

link.description: Link that a member with an account can use to access a mural.

allOf.description: Unique ID of the mural.

The last time the mural was updated in milliseconds. If no change,
this will be the same value as 'createdOn'.
The last collaborator who updated the mural.

thumbnailUrl.description:
A URL pointing to the latest thumbnail generated for this Mural. By default,
it points to our generic BLANK thumbnail.

embedLink.description: A URL pointing to the mural that can be embedded in a blog or any public web page

favorite.description: When true, this indicates that the mural is in the Favorite list for the currently authenticated user.

state.description: Value used to authorize anonymous visitors.

status.description: Whether the current mural has been 'archived' or if it is 'active'.

BaseError.description: Thorough details regarding an error response from the API.

message.description: Short, human readable, description of the error.
message.example: Unknown server error

message.description: Short, human readable, description of the error.
message.example: Unknown server error

BodyBadRequest.description: The request body was malformed or had invalid parameters.

message.description: Human readable message for invalid expiry.
message.example: Visitor link expiry value is invalid

RoomNotFound.description: The requested room was not found.

message.example: The room was not found or does not exist.

MuralNotFound.description: The requested mural was not found.

message.example: The mural was not found or does not exist.

WorkspaceNotFound.description: The requested workspace was not found.

message.example: The workspace was not found or does not exist.

allOf.description: The background color of the mural.

favorite.description: A flag indicating that a mural is in the Favorite list for the logged in user.

height.description: Height of the mural in px.

width.description: Width of the mural in px.

timerSoundTheme.description: The timer sound theme for the mural.

visitorAvatarTheme.description: The visitor avatar theme for the mural.

message.example: The user was not found or does not exist.

muralState.description: The state used to authorize anonymous visitors.

assetType.description: The asset's type to be uploaded. If not specified, 'file' will be used.

fileExtension.description: The file extension to be uploaded.

x-ms-blob-type.description: The blob type to be used for upload the file.

name.description: The path of the workspace followed by the file name.

url.description: The URL where the file will be uploaded.

roomId.description: Unique identifier of the room where the mural will be created.

folderId.description: Optional target folder where the mural will be created.

TargetFolderNotFound.description: The requested room was not found or does not exist.

message.example: The destination folder was not found or does not exist.

downloadFormat.description: The file extension to be exported.

exportId.description: The ID of the export process.

allOf.description: Timestamp in milliseconds of the file creation.
The Unix timestamp in milliseconds, after which the download link becomes invalid.

exportId.description: The ID of the export process.

allOf.description: Unique ID of the mural.

url.description: The URL where the file will be downloaded.

next.description: The token to get the next page of items.

firstName.description: First name of the member or guest in the chat.

lastName.description: Last name of the member or guest in the chat.

id.description: The ID of the chat message.

message.description: The content of the chat message.

createdOn.description: The timestamp of the chat message.

QueryBadRequest.description: The request query string was malformed or had invalid parameters.

code.description: Request query string has invalid parameters.

code.description: Request parameter for pagination limit was invalid.

message.description: Human readable message for limit error.

code.description: The requested pagination parameter is not valid.

message.description: Human readable message for pagination error.

initialTimestamp.description: The initial timestamp of the timer in ms.

now.description: The current timestamp of the timer in ms.

pausedTimestamp.description: The paused timestamp of the timer in ms. Null if no pause action was performed.

soundEnabled.description: If true, the timer will play a sound when it ends.

soundEnabled.description: If true, the timer will play a sound when it ends.
If true, the timer will play a sound when it ends.

avatar.description: The URL for the avatar of the member.

lastName.description: The last name of the member.

owner.description: When true, the user is the owner of the mural.

facilitator.description: When true, the user is the facilitator of the mural.

editPermission.description: The edit permissions for the invited user.

email.description: The email address of the invited user.

username.description: The username of the invited user.

message.description: The custom message to be sent in the email invitation.
message.example: Invitation to brainstorm

sendEmail.description: Indicates if the invitation will or will not be emailed. Default value is true.

rejected.description: When true, the invitation process was rejected.

username.description: Returned when the user is added as member or guest.

emails.description: The array of users' emails to be removed.

rejected.description: If true, the email deletion process was rejected; if false, the email deletion process was successful.

id.description: The ID of the voting session.

title.description: The title of the voting session.

VotingSessionNotFound.description: The requested voting session was not found.

totalVotes.description: The total number of votes for the widget.

uniqueVoters.description: The number of unique collaborators that voted for the widget.

title.description: The title of the voting session.
title.example: Vote on the new project proposal

numberOfVotes.description: The number of votes allowed in the session.

widgetTypes.description: The types of widgets that can be voted on in this session.

anyoneCanEnd.description: If true, anyone can end the voting session.

top.description: The top coordinate of the area.

left.description: The left coordinate of the area.

area.description: The area on the mural where the voting session will take place.

WidgetX.description: The horizontal position of the widget in px. This is the distance from the left of the parent widget, such as an area. If the widget has no parent widget, this is the distance from the left of the mural.

WidgetY.description: The vertical position of the widget in px. This is the distance from the top of the parent widget, such as an area. If the widget has no parent widget, this is the distance from the top of the mural.

id.description: Unique ID of the one-time visitor.

WidgetHidden.description: If true, the widget is hidden from non-facilitators. Applies only when the widget is in the outline.

WidgetHideEditor.description: If true, the name of the collaborator who updated the widget is not recorded (because Private Mode is enabled).

WidgetHideOwner.description: If true, the name of the collaborator who created the widget is not recorded (because Private Mode is enabled).

WidgetInstruction.description: The instructions for a section of the outline. This text can only be added and modified by a facilitator.

WidgetLocked.description: If true, the widget is locked and cannot be updated by a non-facilitator. Any collaborator can unlock a locked widget.

WidgetLockedByFacilitator.description: If true, the widget is locked by a facilitator. Only a facilitator can unlock it.

WidgetParentId.description: The ID of the area widget that contains the widget.

WidgetPresentationIndex.description: The list order of the widget in the outline.

WidgetTextHtmlText.description:
The text in the widget. It supports inline formatting using HTML tags. \
`<b>` - bold text \
`<i>` - italic text \
`<u>` - underline text \
`<s>` - strike text \
`<ul>` - unordered list of items \
`<ol>` - ordered list of items \
`<li>` - list item. \
When set, the `htmlText` property takes priority over the `text` property. \
When using htmlText, the inline HTML tags override style properties such as bold, italic, strike, and underline.
WidgetTextHtmlText.example: Lorem Ipsum has been the industry's standard dummy text ever since the 1500s.

confidential.description:
When true, the room will be marked as confidential. A share link cannot be
generated for confidential rooms. Confidential rooms are for enterprise customers only.

description.example: This room is for deciding on Q4 goals for our Customer Success team

type.description:
When set to 'open', any member of a workspace may join the room.
When set to 'private', only members that are invited may join the room.

allOf.description: Unique identifier of the Workspace
Unique ID of the room.

description.example: This room is for deciding on Q4 goals for our Customer Success team

favorite.description: When true, the room has been marked as a favorite.

allOf.description: Timestamp in milliseconds of the room creation.

type.description: Whether anyone can join the room or not.

confidential.description: When true, the room is confidential. Confidential product feature is for enterprise clients only. A share link cannot be generated for confidential rooms.

isMember.description: When true, the user is a member of the room.

link.description: Link that a member with an account can use to access a room.

description.example: This room is for deciding on Q4 goals for our Customer Success team

favorite.description: If true, the room will be set as a favorite for the currently authorized user.

type.description: If a room is private, it can only be accessed by invitation. If a room is open, it can be accessed by collaborators who have access to the workspace this room is part of.

message.example: The folder was not found or does not exist.

createMurals.description: A flag to allow a member to create murals.

duplicateRoom.description: A flag to allow a member to duplicate the room.

inviteOthers.description: A flag to allow a member to invite other users to the room.

owner.description: A flag to make a member an admin of the room.

Default templates are created by MURAL and are available in all workspaces.
Custom templates are created by workspace members and are only available in the workspace they were created in.

widgetsFilterByTypes.name: type
widgetsFilterByTypes.description:
Comma-separated list of the types of widgets to return.
When not specified, returns all of the widget types.

Types may be specified in any order; the API normalizes them internally.
When using pagination (the `next` token), you must include the same `type`
filter in the URL as in the initial request (order does not need to match).

widgetsFilterByParentId.name: parentId
widgetsFilterByParentId.description: The ID of the parent widget the widget is associated with.

muralsStatus.name: status
muralsStatus.description: When set, filter murals by active or archived status.

muralsSortBy.name: sortBy
muralsSortBy.description:
Sort order:
  * lastCreated - Descending, from most recent to least recent.
  * lastModified - Descending, from most recent to least recent.
  * oldest - Ascending, from least recent to most recent.

muralsFolder.name: folderId
muralsFolder.description: When set, filter murals by their corresponding folder.

withoutDefault.name: withoutDefault
withoutDefault.description: If true, the list of returned templates will not include default templates.
